title: みんなの応援でがんばる！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the Tracen Meet, so I head toward the
track to watch.

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: You got this, Urara! Go for first place!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I won't give up until I win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-Urara! Do your best, but don't hurt yourself!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I let you train with me, so I won't accept anything
but the best performance today!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So you're trying out for the lead role in this opera
too, huh? Then let us both orchestrate a great
symphony and blow them all away!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Orca straight? I'm not sure what that means, but
I'll run as straight as I can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The starting signal sounds and...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Here I goooo! Wha—whoa, whoa, whoaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oh goodness! Haru Urara seems to have
overdone it and tumbled out of the gate!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Owie... I scraped my knee... Oh no! I'm being left
behind!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I can't give up! I've gotta keep going!
Urarararaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara stands up and starts running with all
her might. However...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner is T.M. Opera O! T.M. Opera O is
first across the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... I... I made it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With thunderous applause from her friends, Haru
Urara manages to finish in last place.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-are you all right, Urara?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... I'm fine! I just tripped a little in the beginning, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text:
But you really tried hard, Urara! Even with your
fall, you managed to beat your best time!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: REALLY?! I did it! Yippee!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well done! I can't believe how courageously you
faced such a challenge!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This calls for a round of applause! A big round of
applause for the one who stands second only to
moi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At T.M. Opera O's words, the whole audience
claps for Haru Urara's efforts.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I don't know what I did to deserve this, but
thank you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What a truly brilliant opera! One only you could
have performed!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If I am the sun, that makes you a sunflower. Your
luminosity lies in your simple elegance. That is
what draws people in.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hm? I have no idea what you mean, but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah! Sunflower seeds are super delicious!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You dummy! That's not the point!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the heart of this joyful scene stands Haru
Urara, surrounded by warm smiles and laughter.
